title: Check Collection.toArray() type consistency
description: The Collection.toArray() method returns an Object[] when no arguments are provided to it. This can lead to a ClassCastException at runtime if you try to cast the returned array to an array of a specific type. Instead, use this method by providing an array of the desired type as the argument.
recommendation: Provide an array of the desired type as the argument to Collection.toArray()

checks.message: Use toArray(T[] array) instead of toArray() to avoid ClassCastException
